---
title: "Research"
---

My research focuses on **Machine Learning** and **Statistical Learning** applied to biomedical, health-related and social-science data. I am interested in developing and applying statistical models, machine learning algorithms and data mining methods from both methodological and applied perspectives.

## Research interests

### Non-parametric and ensemble models

A central part of my research concerns non-parametric and ensemble learning methods, with particular attention to robust modelling strategies for complex data structures.

### Survival analysis

I work on statistical and machine learning models for censored data, including ensemble approaches for survival outcomes and biomedical applications.

### Clustering and Bayesian approaches

My research includes clustering methods, Bayesian ensemble approaches, robust similarity measures and methods for high-dimensional and complex data.

### Biomedical and neuroimaging applications

I collaborate on projects involving neurosciences, neuroimaging, radiomics, neurological diseases and biomedical data analysis.

### Social-science and health data

I also apply statistical and computational methods to social-science data, including education, socio-economic topics, health data and questionnaire-based research.

## Keywords

Machine learning · Statistical learning · Survival analysis · Ensemble models · Clustering · Bayesian methods · Biomedical statistics · Neuroimaging · Health data · Social-science data
